scripts.build:pages: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL"); node scripts/gen-build-id.mjs && DEPLOY_BASE=/$REPO_NAME/ vite build && cp build/index.html build/404.html
scripts.deploy: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; npm run build:pages && gh-pages -d build --dotfiles -b gh-pages -r "$REPO_URL" --add
scripts.release: git push origin main && npm run deploy
scripts.build:staging: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL"); node scripts/gen-build-id.mjs && DEPLOY_BASE=/$REPO_NAME/staging/ VITE_APP_ENV=staging vite build && cp build/index.html build/404.html
scripts.deploy:staging: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; npm run build:staging && gh-pages -d build --dotfiles -b gh-pages -r "$REPO_URL" --dest staging --add
scripts.build:dev: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; REPO_NAME=$(basename -s .git "$REPO_URL"); node scripts/gen-build-id.mjs && DEPLOY_BASE=/$REPO_NAME/dev/ VITE_APP_ENV=dev vite build && cp build/index.html build/404.html
scripts.deploy:dev: REPO_URL=${PAGES_REPO_URL:-$(git config --get remote.origin.url || true)}; if [ -z "$REPO_URL" ]; then echo 'Errore: configura origin oppure passa PAGES_REPO_URL=https://github.com/<user>/<repo>.git'; exit 1; fi; npm run build:dev && gh-pages -d build --dotfiles -b gh-pages -r "$REPO_URL" --dest dev --add
